name: Smoked Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Make the sauce as desired, keeping it a bit thinner than usual.
2. Pour the sauce into a pyrex dish and place it on the smoker for several hours.
3. Allow a blackish film to form on the surface of the sauce.
4. Stir in the blackish film every half hour or so until you achieve the desired flavor.
5. Optionally, refrigerate the smoked sauce to allow the fat to harden before using.
